ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document (e.g., Budget Request, House Report) */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, pending, approved) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the document was approved */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the document (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document type (e.g., budget, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year (e.g., FY16) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "budget_allocation" TEXT /* Total budget allocation for the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legislator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the document version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., budget, audit) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit (e.g., document access, user activity) */,
  "audit_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
